title: centaurea degeniana
intro: Centaurea degeniana, also known as Blue Spur Gentian, is a perennial plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its bitter compounds and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea degeniana include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Centaurea degeniana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and overall well-being.
